Registry / Terms / fault

fault

—Not in VIM/VIML G 18 #00661 · 56 instances

Suggested actions

  1. HIGH No authoritative definition in VIM or VIML.
  2. MEDIUM 46 distinct definitions — harmonise.

#01908
T.4.5
difference between the error of indication and the intrinsic error ofa measuring instrument Principally, a fault is the result of an undesired change of data contained in or flowing through an electronic instrument. In this Recommendation a "fault" is a numerical value.
pending
